name: chrY_palindrome_P1
description: Y-chromosome palindromic SD P1 in rat. Inverted-repeat arms (>99% identity) flank spacer; substrate for intra-chromatid recombination. Multi-copy at 95-99% sequence identity; assembly-uncertain in mRatBN7.2.

architecture.internal_structure: SD modules of 10-200 kb at 95-99% identity; shared duplicons across rat pericentromeric/subtelomeric regions.
